productDisplayName: Converse Men CT AS 08 3D HI Blue Shoes
description: These converse Chuck Taylor shoes come in a classic high ankle design with a blue canvas upper covered with a funky doodle graphic pattern and with a cushioned footbed for hours of uninterrupted style and comfort. The white lace-up front with metallic eyelets ensures a snug  Fit while the original rubber toe box and toe guard give added protection. The multi-directional outsole gives added grip.UpperFabric upper for easy maintenance and durabilityUpper with All Star patch detailing beside the ankle and doodle graffiti all-overContrast lacing for maximum style High ankle for extra support to the upper ankle and for styleCarbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug  fitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durabilityEyelets on the lateral side for ventilationMidsoleComfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioningOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionDiamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
